metadata.description: Spec-Driven Development pipeline skills for Claude Code (stack-agnostic 核心 + 選裝 stack pack)

plugins.name: srun
plugins.description: Tier 1/2/3 SDD pipeline — /srun:decisions / /srun:feat / /srun:fix / /srun:review / /srun:verify-flow / /srun:comment / /srun:retro + guidelines behavioral skill + opus-reviewer agent + SessionStart intent-guidance hook (spectra/openspec backend adapter), driven by OpenSpec change artifacts

plugins.name: srun-stack-vue
plugins.description: srun 的 Vue/Nuxt stack pack — 零內容薄 plugin，依賴 antfu-skills 的 vue-stack 與 web-common，一次拉齊 Vue 生態知識型 skills
